name: Vehicle info
instructions: Ask whether the caller's car is drivable and where the damage is. Capture 'vehicle_drivable' (boolean), 'damage_areas' (free-form string like 'front bumper and right headlight'), and 'other_party_present' (boolean — was another vehicle involved?). If vehicle isn't drivable, mention that the adjuster can arrange towing on the callback — don't quote rates or coverage specifics.
